customer_question: Can I change my plan mid-cycle?
approved_answer: Plan changes take effect on the next billing cycle.
policy_context: Plan changes are queued and applied at the next billing boundary.

approved_answer: Verify the card details and try again; if it persists contact billing.
policy_context: Card declines should be diagnosed against the gateway before refund actions.

customer_question: How do I export my data?
approved_answer: Data export is available from Settings > Account > Export.
policy_context: Self-service export is the default; backend export is on request only.

approved_answer: Account deletion is permanent; confirm via the email link.
policy_context: Account deletion requires email confirmation and is irreversible after 7 days.
